subject: Economics
chapter: Forms of Market and Price Determination

remember: Students will be able to recall the different forms of market structures, their characteristics, and examples.
Students will be able to list the factors that determine the price of a commodity in different market structures.
Students will be able to identify the types of price determination in perfect competition and monopolistic competition.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of perfect competition, its assumptions, and the price determination process.
Students will be able to describe the characteristics of monopolistic competition and the price determination process.
Students will be able to compare and contrast perfect competition and monopolistic competition.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of market structures to real-world scenarios and explain price determination.
Students will be able to use the concepts of supply and demand to determine prices in different market structures.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of different market structures.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of government policies on price determination in different market structures.

ncert_objectives: To explain the concept of perfect competition and its assumptions.
To describe the characteristics of monopolistic competition and the price determination process.
To compare and contrast perfect competition and monopolistic competition.
board_exam_objectives: To identify the forms of market structures and their characteristics.
To explain the factors that determine price in perfect competition and monopolistic competition.
To apply the concepts of market structures to real-world scenarios and explain price determination.
